common.deleteItemConfirmDescription: Apakah Anda yakin Anda ingin menghapus item ini?

errors.unknownErrorTryAgain: Terjadi kesalahan tidak diketahui. Coba lagi.
errors.vaultTooLarge: Vault terlalu besar untuk diterima server. Coba untuk menghapus beberapa item atau lampiran untuk mengurangi ukuran dan coba lagi.
errors.serverVersionTooOld: Server AliasVault perlu diperbarui ke versi yang lebih baru agar dapat menggunakan fitur ini. Silakan hubungi admin server jika Anda memerlukan bantuan.

auth.enterPassword: Masukkan kata sandi Anda untuk membuka kunci brankas
auth.biometricPrompt: Apakah Anda ingin menggunakan {{biometric}} untuk membuka kunci brankas Anda?
auth.authCodeNote: Catatan: Jika kamu tidak punya akses ke perangkat autentikator-mu, kamu bisa me-reset 2FA dengan kode recovery dengan cara login melalui website.

errors.credentialsRequired: Nama Pengguna dan Kata Sandi diperlukan
errors.invalidAuthCode: Mohon masukkan 6-digit kode autentikasi yang valid
errors.incorrectPassword: Kata sandi salah. Silakan coba lagi.
errors.serverError: Tidak dapat menjangkau Server AliasVault. Silakan coba lagi nanti atau hubungi layanan pelanggan jika masalah berlanjut.
errors.serverErrorSelfHosted: Tidak dapat menjangkau API. Untuk instans yang di-host mandiri, pastikan endpoint API dapat dijangkau dengan membukanya di browser: halaman tersebut harus menampilkan 'OK'.
errors.networkError: Permintaan jaringan gagal. Silakan periksa koneksi internet Anda dan coba lagi.
errors.networkErrorSelfHosted: Permintaan jaringan gagal. Periksa koneksi jaringan Anda dan ketersediaan server. Untuk instans yang di-host sendiri, pastikan Anda telah memasang sertifikat SSL yang valid. Sertifikatself-signed tidak didukung pada perangkat seluler karena alasan keamanan.
errors.sessionExpired: Sesi Anda telah berakhir. Silakan masuk kembali.

auth.confirmLogout: Apakah Anda yakin ingin keluar? Anda harus masuk kembali dengan kata sandi utama Anda untuk mengakses brankas.

logout.unsyncedChangesWarning: Anda memiliki perubahan yang belum disinkronkan yang akan hilang jika Anda keluar sekarang. Apakah Anda yakin ingin melanjutkan?

errors.vaultOutdated: Brankas Anda sudah usang. Silakan masuk ke situs web AliasVault dan ikuti langkah-langkahnya.
errors.versionNotSupported: Aplikasi seluler AliasVault versi ini sudah tidak didukung lagi oleh server. Silakan perbarui aplikasi Anda ke versi terbaru.
errors.serverVersionNotSupported: Server AliasVault perlu diperbarui ke versi yang lebih baru untuk dapat menggunakan aplikasi seluler ini. Silakan hubungi support jika Anda memerlukan bantuan.
errors.appOutdated: Aplikasi ini sudah usang dan tidak dapat digunakan untuk mengakses versi brankas yang (lebih baru) ini. Silakan perbarui aplikasi AliasVault untuk melanjutkan.
errors.passwordChanged: Kata sandi Anda telah berubah sejak terakhir kali Anda masuk. Silakan masuk kembali untuk alasan keamanan.
errors.passwordChangeRequiresOnline: Perubahan kata sandi memerlukan koneksi internet. Silakan coba lagi saat online.

passkeys.helpText: Passkey dibuat di situs web saat diminta. Passkey tidak dapat diubah secara manual. Untuk menghapus Passkey ini, Anda dapat menghapusnya dari kredensial ini.
passkeys.passkeyWillBeDeleted: Passkey ini akan dihapus saat Anda menyimpan kredensial ini.

totp.instructions: Masukkan kunci rahasia yang ditampilkan oleh situs web tempat Anda ingin menambahkan autentikasi dua faktor.

errors.scanFailed: Failed to scan QR code. Please try again.

settings.title: Pengaturan

iosAutofillSettings.headerText: You can configure AliasVault to provide native password and passkey autofill functionality in iOS. Follow the instructions below to enable it.
iosAutofillSettings.passkeyNotice: Passkeys are created through iOS. To store them in AliasVault, ensure Autofill below is enabled.
iosAutofillSettings.step1: 1. Open iOS Settings via the button below
iosAutofillSettings.step5: 5. Disable other password providers (e.g. "iCloud Passwords") to avoid conflicts

androidAutofillSettings.warningDescription: Autofill and passkey support for Android is currently in an experimental state.
androidAutofillSettings.headerText: You can configure AliasVault to provide native password and passkey autofill functionality in Android. Follow the instructions below to enable it.
androidAutofillSettings.passkeyNotice: Passkeys are created through Android Credential Manager (Android 14+). To store them in AliasVault, ensure Autofill below is enabled.
androidAutofillSettings.step1: 1. Open Android Settings via the button below, and change the "autofill preferred service" to "AliasVault"
androidAutofillSettings.buttonTip: If the button above doesn't work it might be blocked because of security settings. You can manually go to Android Settings → General Management → Passwords and autofill.
androidAutofillSettings.step2: 2. Some apps, e.g. Google Chrome, may require manual configuration in their settings to allow third-party autofill apps. However, most apps should work with autofill by default.
androidAutofillSettings.showSearchTextDescription: Include the text AliasVault receives from Android that it uses to search for a matching credential

settings.copyTotpOnFillDescription: When you autofill a credential with 2FA, automatically copy its TOTP code to the clipboard so you can paste it into the next field.
settings.clipboardClearDescription: Automatically clear copied passwords and sensitive information from your clipboard after a specified time period.
settings.clipboardClearAndroidWarning: Note: some Android devices have clipboard history enabled, which may keep track of previously copied items, even after AliasVault clears the clipboard. AliasVault can only overwrite the most recent item, but older entries may remain visible in history. For security reasons, we recommend disabling any clipboard history features in your device settings.
settings.clipboardLocalOnlyDescription: Keep copied credentials on this device instead of syncing them to your other Apple devices via Universal Clipboard.
settings.clipboardLocalOnlyDisabledWarning: With this off, copied credentials can sync to your other Apple devices (Mac, iPad, etc.) through Universal Clipboard.
settings.batteryOptimizationHelpTitle: Aktifkan Pembersihan Papan Klip di Latar Belakang
settings.batteryOptimizationDisabled: Aktifkan Pembersihan Papan Klip di Latar Belakang
settings.batteryOptimizationHelpDescription: Optimasi baterai Android mencegah pembersihan papan klip yang andal saat aplikasi berada di latar belakang. Menonaktifkan optimasi baterai untuk AliasVault memungkinkan pembersihan papan klip di latar belakang secara akurat dan secara otomatis memberikan izin alarm yang diperlukan.
settings.importSectionDescription: Import your passwords from other password managers or from a previous AliasVault export.
settings.importWebNote: To import credentials from existing password managers, please login to the web app. The import feature is currently only available on the web version.
settings.exportSectionDescription: Export your vault data to a CSV file. This file can be used as a back-up and can also be imported into other password managers.
settings.exportWarning:
Warning: Exporting your vault to an unencrypted file will expose all of your passwords and sensitive information in plain text. Only do this on trusted devices and ensure you:

• Store the exported file in a secure location
• Delete the file when you no longer need it
• Never share the exported file with others

Are you sure you want to continue with the export?

passwordConfirm.exportDescription: For security reasons, please enter your master password to confirm this export.

settings.languageSystemMessage: To change the app language, configure the preferred language for AliasVault in your device settings.

vaultUnlockSettings.description: Choose how you want to unlock your vault.
vaultUnlockSettings.biometricDisabledMessage: {{biometric}} is disabled for AliasVault. In order to use it, please enable it in your device settings first.
vaultUnlockSettings.biometricHelp: Use biometrics to unlock your vault, which is secured by the {{keystore}}.
vaultUnlockSettings.biometricUnavailableHelp: {{biometric}} is not available. Tap to open settings and/or go to your device settings to enable and configure it.
vaultUnlockSettings.featureRequiresPasscode: This feature requires a passcode to be enabled on your device.
vaultUnlockSettings.pinDescription: Use a custom PIN code to unlock your vault more quickly.
vaultUnlockSettings.pinEnabled: Pembukaan kunci dengan PIN berhasil diaktifkan
vaultUnlockSettings.passwordHelp: Re-enter your full master password to unlock your vault. This is always enabled as fallback option.

autoLockSettings.description: Choose how long the app can stay in the background before requiring re-authentication. You'll need to use Face ID or enter your password to unlock the vault again.

identityGeneratorSettings.description: Konfigurasikan bahasa default dan preferensi jenis kelamin untuk membuat identitas baru.
identityGeneratorSettings.languageDescription: Atur bahasa yang akan digunakan saat membuat identitas baru.
identityGeneratorSettings.genderDescription: Atur preferensi jenis kelamin untuk membuat identitas baru.
identityGeneratorSettings.ageRangeDescription: Atur rentang usia untuk membuat identitas baru.

passwordGeneratorSettings.description: Configure the default settings used when generating new passwords. These settings will be used for all new passwords unless overridden for specific entries.

securitySettings.title: Security
securitySettings.description: Manage your account and vault security settings.

changePassword.headerText: Changing your master password also changes the vault encryption keys. It is advised to periodically change your master password to keep your vaults secure.
changePassword.failedToChange: Failed to change password. Please try again.

activeSessions.headerText: Below is a list of devices where your account is currently logged in or has an active session. You can log out from any of these sessions here.
activeSessions.revokeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to revoke this session? This will log you out of the chosen device.

authLogs.headerText: Below you can find an overview of recent login attempts to your account.

deleteAccount.headerText: Deleting your account will immediately and permanently delete all of your data.
deleteAccount.warningText: Warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.finalWarning: Final warning: Enter your password to permanently delete your account.
deleteAccount.warningVaults: All encrypted vaults which includes all of your credentials will be permanently deleted
deleteAccount.warningAliases: Your email aliases will be orphaned and cannot be claimed by other users
deleteAccount.warningRecovery: Your account cannot be recovered after deletion
deleteAccount.irreversibleWarning: Account deletion is irreversible and cannot be undone. Pressing the button below will delete your account immediately and permanently.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.failedToDelete: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

mobileLogin.confirmSubtitle: Re-authenticate to approve login on another device.
mobileLogin.confirmMessage: You are about to log in on a remote device with your account. This other device will have full access to your vault. Only proceed if you trust this device.
mobileLogin.successDescription: The remote device has been successfully logged in.
mobileLogin.requestExpired: This login request has expired. Please generate a new QR code.

items.title: Items
items.itemCreatedMessage: Your new item has been added to your vault and is ready to use.
items.name: Nama
items.publicEmailDescription: Anonim tetapi privasi terbatas. Isi email dapat dibaca oleh siapa pun yang mengetahui alamat tersebut.
items.noMatchingItems: Tidak ada item yang sesuai dengan filter yang dipilih.
items.noMatchingItemsWithFilter: Tidak ada {{filter}} items yang sama dengan "{{search}}"
items.noItemsFound: No items found. Create one to get started. Tip: you can also login to the AliasVault web app to import credentials from other password managers.
items.allItemsInFolders: All your items are organized in folders. Tap a folder above to view your credentials, or use the search to find specific items.
items.offlineEmailsMessage: Anda sedang offline. Silakan hubungkan ke internet untuk memuat email Anda.
items.emailLoadError: An error occurred while loading emails. Please try again later.
items.emailUnexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while loading emails. Please try again later.
items.offlineMessage: You are offline. Please connect to the internet to sync your vault.
items.switchBackToOriginalApp: Switch back to the original app to continue.

autofillOpenApp.title: Autofill request
autofillOpenApp.description: Choose an action for the app or website that requested autofill.
autofillOpenApp.findExistingDescription: Select an existing credential from your vault to link to the address above.
autofillOpenApp.createNewDescription: Add a new credential to your vault for this app or URL.

autofillLinkExisting.title: Link to existing credential
autofillLinkExisting.intro: Select an existing credential from your vault to link to "{{target}}".
autofillLinkExisting.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to link "{{url}}" to this credential?

autofillUrlAdded.title: Credential linked
autofillUrlAdded.message: Autofill should now offer this credential the next time you open the app.

items.downloadToView: Download the file to view it

unsavedChanges.title: Discard Changes?
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

toasts.passwordCopied: Kata sandi disalin ke papan klip

items.deleteHistoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this history record?
items.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

folders.deleteFolderKeepItemsDescription: Item akan dipindahkan ke folder induk.
folders.deleteFolderAndItemsDescription: Sebanyak {{count}} item akan dipindahkan ke Baru Dihapus.
folders.emptyFolderHint: This folder is empty. To move items to this folder, edit the item and select this folder.

recentlyDeleted.title: Baru-baru ini dihapus
recentlyDeleted.noItemsDescription: Item yang Anda hapus akan muncul di sini selama {{days}} hari sebelum dihapus secara permanen.
recentlyDeleted.description: Item-item ini akan dihapus secara permanen setelah {{days}} hari. Anda dapat memulihkannya atau segera menghapusnya.
recentlyDeleted.confirmDeleteMessage: Item ini akan dihapus secara permanen dan tidak dapat dipulihkan.
recentlyDeleted.confirmEmptyAllTitle: Kosongkan Item yang Baru Saja Dihapus?
recentlyDeleted.confirmEmptyAllMessage: Semua {{count}} item akan dihapus secara permanen dan tidak dapat dipulihkan.

emails.title: Email
emails.subject: Subject:
emails.deleteEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this email? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
emails.offlineMessage: Anda sedang offline. Silakan hubungkan ke internet untuk memuat email Anda.
emails.emptyMessage: Anda belum menerima email apa pun di alamat email privat Anda. Ketika Anda menerima email baru, email tersebut akan muncul di sini.

validation.invalidDateFormat: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format

apiErrors.CLAIM_DOES_NOT_MATCH_USER: Alamat email yang dipilih saat ini sudah digunakan. Silakan ubah alamat email dengan mengedit kredensial ini.
apiErrors.CLAIM_DOES_NOT_EXIST: Terjadi kesalahan saat mencoba memuat email. Silakan coba ubah dan simpan entri kredensial untuk menyinkronkan basis data, lalu coba lagi.
apiErrors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Terjadi kesalahan tidak diketahui. Coba lagi.
apiErrors.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Akun Anda sementara terkunci karena terlalu banyak percobaan masuk yang gagal. Silakan coba lagi nanti.
apiErrors.ACCOUNT_BLOCKED: Akun Anda telah dinonaktifkan. Jika Anda yakin ini adalah kesalahan, silakan hubungi layanan pelanggan.
apiErrors.USER_NOT_FOUND: Username atau password salah. Mohon coba lagi.
apiErrors.INVALID_AUTHENTICATOR_CODE: Kode autentikator salah. Mohon coba lagi.
apiErrors.INVALID_RECOVERY_CODE: Kode pemulihan salah. Mohon coba lagi.
apiErrors.PUBLIC_REGISTRATION_DISABLED: Pendaftaran akun baru saat ini dinonaktifkan di server ini. Silakan hubungi administrator.
apiErrors.USERNAME_MISMATCH: Nama pengguna tidak sesuai dengan pengguna saat ini.
apiErrors.PASSWORD_MISMATCH: Kata sandi yang diberikan tidak sesuai dengan kata sandi Anda saat ini.
apiErrors.USERNAME_EMPTY_OR_WHITESPACE: Nama pengguna tidak boleh kosong atau mengandung spasi.
apiErrors.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Nama pengguna terlalu pendek: harus minimal 3 karakter.
apiErrors.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Nama pengguna terlalu panjang: tidak boleh lebih dari 40 karakter.
apiErrors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARACTERS: Nama pengguna tidak valid, hanya boleh berisi huruf atau angka.
apiErrors.VAULT_NOT_UP_TO_DATE: Vault Anda bukan yang terkini. Harap sinkronkan vault Anda dan coba lagi.
apiErrors.VAULT_ERROR: Vault lokal Anda belum diperbarui. Harap sinkronkan vault Anda dengan menyegarkan halaman dan coba lagi.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: This page has been moved or deleted.

vaultError.title: Vault Error
vaultError.description: An error occurred while loading your vault. If this problem persists, please contact support.

loginSettings.title: API Connection
loginSettings.customProxyHeadersDescription: Add HTTP headers that will be sent with every request to your AliasVault server. Can be used for self-hosted setups behind a reverse proxy that checks for custom headers (e.g. Pangolin, Cloudflare Access).

upgrade.title: Perbarui Brankas
upgrade.subtitle: AliasVault telah diperbarui dan brankas Anda perlu ditingkatkan skalanya. Ini hanya memerlukan waktu beberapa detik.
upgrade.whatsNewDescription: Pembaruan diperlukan untuk mendukung perubahan berikut:
upgrade.noDescriptionAvailable: Tidak ada deskripsi yang tersedia untuk versi ini.

status.vaultAlreadyUpToDate: Vault is already up to date

alerts.unableToGetVersionInfo: Tidak dapat memperoleh informasi versi. Silakan coba lagi.
alerts.selfHostedWarning: Jika Anda menggunakan server yang dihosting mandiri, pastikan untuk memperbarui instans tersebut juga, karena jika tidak, proses masuk ke klien web akan berhenti berfungsi.
